irdnepal_molrjskh.headline: IRD Nepal has issued a new notice: “सूचना प्रविधिको विस्तार: दिगो विकासको आधार” — राष्ट्रिय सञ्
irdnepal_molrjskh.body:
💰 Tax update alert for Nepal businesses and professionals!

📌 Notice: “सूचना प्रविधिको विस्तार: दिगो विकासको आधार” — राष्ट्रिय सञ्चार तथा सूचना प्रविधि दिवस २०२६ भव्यताका साथ मनाऔँ।

💡 Why this matters:
This may impact your tax filing obligations, VAT returns, or TDS compliance deadlines.

✅ Action: Share this with your accounts team and tax consultant.

🔗 Source: IRD Nepal
🔗 Link: https://ird.gov.np/content/13510/expansion-of-information-technology--basis-for-sustainable/
irdnepal_molrjskh.callToAction: Share this with your accounts team and tax consultant.
